metadata.description: Multi-LLM council slash command for Claude Code — Claude Opus drafter (Mode A), three independent cold-context judges (Gemini, Codex, Claude).

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: /council slash command — runs a multi-LLM council with strict separation of powers. Three independent cold-context judges (Gemini, Codex, Claude) critique an idea, draft, plan, decision, or output in parallel. Disagreement is the signal.
